dima·dima·dima

VP Data & Analytics · Systems Thinker · Builder of Odd Things

Selected Projects

data vizcinemareactthree.js

All Roads to Kill Bill

An interactive influence network mapping every film that fed into Kill Bill — and every film it spawned. 200+ nodes, one obsession. Built with React, Three.js, and TMDB.

↗ allroadstokillbill.vercel.app
musicdatapythonvisualization

Concert History

Every show I've been to since 2007, reconstructed from Spotify history, Google Calendar, and purchase records. Concerts as data. Data as autobiography.

↗ dima-spotify.vercel.app
producttoolsreact

Job Tinder

Swipe on job postings. Energizing or draining? A dead-simple decision tool built mid job-search to cut through analysis paralysis. React + Framer Motion.

↗ jobtinder-nu.vercel.app
aikidsreactgemini

Lil' Mimic Studio

A dad-built AI character creator for toddlers. Upload a photo, generate a character, make a comic. Powered by Google Gemini. 10,000+ generations and counting.

↗ ai.studio
